# uapi_unbound_srv (Data Source)

Look up the unbound srv options.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "uapi_unbound_srv" "example" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the entry is active.
- `etag` (String) Opaque ETag of the resource's current state.
- `id` (String) Stable id.
- `interface_bind` (List of String) Addresses unbound binds on (`addr` or `addr@port`). Pair with the main unbound `interface_auto = false` for exclusive binding.
- `interface_outgoing` (List of String) Source addresses for upstream recursion (multi-WAN egress).
- `ip_transparent` (Boolean) Bind to addresses that are not yet up (VIP / alias / floating addresses).
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the underlying uci section is uapi-managed.
- `srv_line` (List of String) Verbatim lines inserted inside unbound's `server:` clause. One entry per line; `unbound-checkconf` validates grammar after restart.
